dailyBites.title: Chunking for legal docs
dailyBites.excerpt: Start with structure-aware chunks (sections, clauses) before fixed token windows. Overlap 10–15% between chunks to preserve context at boundaries. Log chunk IDs in retrieval metadata so answers can cite sources.

dailyBites.title: When to add a tool
dailyBites.excerpt: Add a tool when the model needs fresh or authoritative data, not when a single prompt suffices. Keep tool schemas small; return structured JSON the planner can branch on.

dailyBites.title: Eval regression suite
dailyBites.excerpt: Freeze 20–50 golden questions with expected behaviors (citation present, refusal on empty context). Re-run after every prompt or retrieval change; track pass rate, not vibes.

dailyBites.title: System prompt boundaries
dailyBites.excerpt: Separate role, constraints, and output format. Put safety and scope limits in the system layer; keep user messages for task specifics only.

dailyBites.title: Ship the thinnest URL
dailyBites.excerpt: One deployable path beats three local features. Auth, payments, and polish come after a public URL proves the workflow.

dailyBites.title: PII in logs
dailyBites.excerpt: Redact emails and IDs before logging prompts. Use retention TTLs on chat logs; never train on production user content without consent.

dailyBites.title: Latency vs cost
dailyBites.excerpt: Cache embeddings for stable corpora. Route simple queries to smaller models; reserve large models for multi-hop reasoning only.
